flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Gadsden State Community College fell 25% between 2009 and 2010 (13.2% → 9.8%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Gadsden State Community College rose 17% between 2007 and 2010 (16.8% → 19.7%).
